onboarding.language_desc: Pick the UI and default companion Latte's dialogue language. You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.welcome_desc: A storybook of humanity, AI, and love.
onboarding.philosophy_desc: Capture your memories with your loved one in words. Leave anchors in the flow of time—let love endure.
onboarding.compression_desc: Use AI to generate weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly summaries with one tap, then copy them. Use the layered, compressed shared memories to awaken your loved one.
onboarding.ai_setup_desc: BaiShou itself does not store your AI keys. Configure standard OpenAI compatible protocols to start your soul dialogue.
onboarding.api_guide_desc: BaiShou doesn't store your keys. Configure an AI provider to chat with your companion and generate memory summaries. Go to Settings > Provider Management when ready—or set this up later.
onboarding.privacy_desc: Your and your partner's data stays on your device. We don't upload it to our servers; everything is processed locally.
onboarding.storage_desc: Choose a place to keep the memories you share with your loved one.
onboarding.storage_desc_mobile: BaiShou must store diaries and summaries in the fixed BaiShou_Root folder (/storage/emulated/0/BaiShou_Root, same as desktop) so you can manage them in any file manager. Grant “All files access” before saving—no sandbox fallback.
onboarding.storage_permission_error: Cannot access selected directory, please ensure read/write permissions.
onboarding.welcome_sub: Setting up your personal workspace and initializing index configuration.
onboarding.ai_config_desc: BaiShou doesn't store your keys. Configure an AI provider to chat with your companion and generate memory summaries. Go to Settings > Provider Management when ready—or set this up later.
onboarding.ai_config_steps: Go to Settings > Provider Management when ready—or set this up later.
onboarding.import_desc: If you have previous backup data, you can import it through the "Data Management" feature in settings after completing the guide.
onboarding.import_steps: After completing the guide, please go to: Settings → Data Management → Import Backup, select your ZIP backup file to restore data.

settings.tooltip_summary_model: This model is used to generate weekly, monthly, quarterly summaries and annuals. Choosing a higher-performing model is recommended for better output quality.
settings.tooltip_chat_model: This model is used for daily chat interactions.
settings.tooltip_naming_model: Assign a lightweight model to automatically generate titles for your conversations, saving main model compute resources.
settings.tooltip_embedding_model: This model is utilized when storing vectors into RAG memory. When a diary changes, AI uses this model to generate vector indices, enabling semantic search index logic.
settings.tooltip_rag_management: A local RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) knowledge base that enables AI to retrieve past diary contexts, auto-updating with diary changes for semantic memory recall.

settings.mcp_help_intro: When MCP is enabled, BaiShou runs a local MCP server so external AI clients (e.g. Cursor) can use diary, memory, and other tools.
settings.mcp_help_json_1: Open MCP JSON settings in your client and add a server under mcpServers.
settings.mcp_help_json_2: Set type to streamableHttp and baseUrl to the connection URL above (must end with /mcp).
settings.mcp_help_cursor_1: Open Cursor Settings → Features → MCP (or edit project/global mcp.json).
settings.mcp_help_cursor_2: Add a server with the connection URL above, then restart Cursor or refresh MCP.
settings.mcp_help_vscode_1: In an extension that supports MCP, add a remote MCP server.
settings.mcp_help_vscode_2: Set the server URL to the connection URL above, then reload the window or reconnect MCP.
settings.mcp_help_note: Use the /mcp URL above (not /sse). Keep the BaiShou desktop app running while connected.

data_sync.title: Data Sync
data_sync.backup_tooltip: Packs all diaries and settings into a zip backup. Renaming a backup file marks it as 'Manual'. When the backup limit is exceeded and auto-cleanup triggers, only normal backups will be deleted, ensuring 'Manual' records are safely preserved.
data_sync.snapshot_tooltip: Local snapshots are historical backups automatically generated by the system. To avoid redundancy, they are only created in two scenarios: 1. before restoring a full backup; 2. before restoring/applying a local snapshot. Restoring a snapshot will revert all data, settings, and database states to the exact moment the snapshot was created.
data_sync.incremental_sync_tooltip: Two-way incremental sync scans all vaults: diaries, summaries, chat sessions, AI partners, attachments, and `.baishou/settings/` (including API config). Only changed files are transferred, and deletions propagate. Default cloud prefix is memories_sync, separate from full backup.
data_sync.incremental_sync_enable_warning:
Sync keeps the version with the latest file modification time and overwrites the older copy on the other side. This can cause unexpected data loss. Please make sure you understand the risk.

API keys and other sensitive settings in each vault's `.baishou/settings/` will also be synced to the cloud. Ensure your cloud storage access is properly secured.

We recommend enabling version control (Git) on desktop to protect your data. Mobile is better suited for one-way backup.
data_sync.backup_scope_intro: Packages data into a ZIP archive (not bidirectional incremental file sync)
data_sync.backup_scope_root: Full vault file tree under workspace root (diaries, summaries, sessions, AI partners, attachments, per-vault settings, etc.)
data_sync.backup_scope_database_detail: Includes Agent sessions and messages, AI partner config, summary index, and RAG vector memories
data_sync.backup_scope_not_incremental: Unlike File Sync: full backup is a full overwrite restore; file sync incrementally syncs all vaults file-by-file
data_sync.backup_scope_excludes_heading: Not included (rebuilt after import or kept locally)
data_sync.backup_scope_excludes_shadow: Diary full-text search index (Shadow index, rebuilt automatically after import)
data_sync.backup_scope_excludes_sync_meta: Incremental sync state (manifest, ancestor snapshot, etc., reset after import)
data_sync.backup_scope_import_note: Import fully overwrites data; cloud sync settings (cloud_sync_config) keep current local values, all other data comes from the backup
data_sync.cloud_restore_warning: Restore will fully overwrite workspace and database (cloud sync settings kept locally). Continue?
data_sync.desc: Sync your memories to cloud (S3 or WebDAV) for multi-device backup.
data_sync.target_local_desc: Stored only on this device, no cloud sync
data_sync.target_s3_desc: MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Alibaba Cloud OSS, etc.
data_sync.snapshots_scope_hint: Local snapshots are automatically generated before major changes like restoring backups to facilitate data rollback.
data_sync.local_target_no_cloud_records_desc: You can switch to the "Local Snapshots" tab to manage system snapshots, or bind S3/WebDAV cloud storage in "Backup Settings".
data_sync.local_target_no_cloud_records: Current backup target is local storage.

data_sync.max_backup_desc: Old backups will be auto-deleted when exceeding the limit
data_sync.name_url_required: Name and URL cannot be empty
data_sync.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sync target?
data_sync.restore_warning: Restoring will overwrite current data. Continue?
data_sync.add_hint: Click the add button in the top right to configure sync targets
data_sync.incremental_sync_desc: Scans all vaults under the storage root for two-way file sync with deletion propagation. For daily cross-device sync. Use Data Backup for full archives.
data_sync.sync_mode_comparison_incremental_desc: Bidirectional per-file sync for all vaults; excludes the SQLite database; default cloud prefix memories_sync
data_sync.sync_mode_comparison_full_desc: ZIP archive overwrite restore; includes database and device preferences; use the Data Backup page
data_sync.sync_mode_comparison_hint: Different cloud paths and data scopes — do not mix the two.
data_sync.sync_mode_comparison_help_aria: Learn the difference between file sync and full backup
data_sync.plan_up_to_date: Local and remote are already in sync
data_sync.plan_confirm_desc: Active vault: {{activeVault}}. {{count}} file(s) will change across all vaults. Review and confirm to continue.
data_sync.plan_confirm_countdown: Review the list carefully. Confirm available in {{seconds}}s
data_sync.plan_boundary_disk_only: On disk but not in registry
data_sync.plan_boundary_registry_only: In registry but missing on disk
data_sync.plan_warning_unknown_vault_paths: These vaults have file changes but are not in your local registry: {{paths}}. Create matching vaults in Settings → Workspaces, or confirm these folders should sync.
data_sync.plan_warning_disk_vaults_not_in_registry: Vault folders on disk are not in the registry: {{vaults}}. Sync will still process files in those folders.
data_sync.plan_warning_registry_vaults_missing_on_: These registered vaults are missing on disk: {{missing}}
data_sync.plan_warning_high_divergence: Large divergence from remote ({{divergence}}%, limit {{limit}}%). Continuing may overwrite many files.
data_sync.plan_warning_delete_blocked: Mass deletion or local data-loss risk detected. Bidirectional delete propagation is blocked. Check cloud or local data first.
data_sync.max_divergence_hint: Blocks bidirectional sync and download-only when local and remote manifests differ by more than this ratio. Upload-only is not affected. 100 disables this protection. S3 and WebDAV keep separate sync snapshots.
data_sync.error_divergence_exceeded: Local/remote divergence is {{divergence}}%, which exceeds your limit of {{limit}}%. Sync was aborted. Raise the limit, use upload-only, or verify the correct storage target.
data_sync.error_divergence_exceeded_generic: Local and remote differ too much for the configured limit. Sync was aborted.
data_sync.error_divergence_first_sync_confirm_mess: This device is connecting to this cloud target for the first time. Local/remote divergence is {{divergence}}%, above your limit of {{limit}}%. Continue only if this is the correct storage (e.g. restoring from another device). Otherwise cancel and check your settings.
data_sync.error_delete_propagation_mass_delete: This sync would delete a large number of remote files and was aborted. Use Download only to pull remote data first, or confirm your local copy is complete.
data_sync.error_delete_propagation_local_data_loss: Local files are far fewer than the last sync record, suggesting local data loss. Bidirectional sync was blocked to protect remote data. Use Download only to restore first.

summary.shared_memory_tooltip: Aggregates and filters diaries and summaries by year, quarter, month, and week based on the selected lookback range (months), generating a clean context for AI retrieval.
summary.algorithm_desc: Based on the BaiShou cascade folding algorithm, redundent data is automatically filtered to build our collective memory context.
summary.copy_prefix_hint: Automatically added to the front of copied content (e.g., Hi, these are my memories...)
summary.cascade_folding_content:
To provide the AI with the most efficient memory context, BaiShou uses a 'Cascade Folding' algorithm:

1. Overlap Mechanism: If a Monthly or Quarterly report has been generated for a period, the system assumes the AI already understands the macro-context of that time, so it folds (hides) original diary entries from that period in the shared memory.
2. Progressive Detail: The system prioritizes keeping detailed diaries from the most recent weeks, while older memories are presented through higher-dimensional forms like Weekly, Monthly, or Quarterly reports.
3. Distillation vs Redundancy: This ensures that within limited Token constraints, the AI can see both recent details and the big picture without getting bogged down in an overwhelming sea of raw diary entries.
summary.error_select_range: Please select a date range first
summary.no_data_range: No diary data found in this range
summary.raw_data_desc: Lossless export of all diary data within a range, including metadata and tags.
summary.lookback_folded: Collective Memories (Past $months months - Folded by Algorithm)
summary.confirm_delete_summary: Are you sure you want to delete this summary? Original diary data will not be affected.
summary.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the summary for "$title"? This action cannot be undone.
summary.shared_memory_copy_subtitle: Shared memories from the past $months months
summary.shared_memory_desc: High-value memory fragments, folded and extracted for quick sharing and review.
summary.rescan_success: Scan complete. Stats have been refreshed.
summary.rescan_failed: Scan failed. Please try again later.
summary.generation_timeout: AI summary request timed out. This is usually caused by slow networks or delayed AI response. We suggest switching to a more stable AI model in settings and try again.
summary.model_not_configured_desc:
You haven't configured an AI model yet, cannot generate summaries.

summary.service_disabled_desc:

Please re-enable it in settings or choose another available model.

privacy.title: Privacy & Philosophy
privacy.data_ownership_desc: BaiShou believes memory is a soul extension. Your data is stored locally. Unauthorized uploads never occur beyond your chosen AI/Sync providers.
privacy.local_first_desc: Write diaries offline seamlessly. AI summaries are generated on-demand; we don't store your generated texts.
privacy.transparency_desc: Supports end-to-end data export. Take your memories with you anytime via ZIP or sync to your own S3/WebDAV space.

agent.start_conversation_hint: Type something below, or click on the left to start a new chat~

tools.community_coming_soon: You will be able to install and share tools from the community
tools.web_search_not_enabled: Web search not enabled. Please enable it in the toolbar.
tools.param_max_results_desc: Maximum number of results returned per AI search
tools.param_max_results_tooltip: Limits how many diary search hits are returned in one query.
tools.diary_read_tooltip: Lets the partner read full diary entries by date. Up to 20 entries per call; pass exact dates (use List or Search Diaries first if unknown).
tools.diary_edit_tooltip: Edit an existing diary—append with a timestamp or overwrite the full entry.
tools.diary_delete_tooltip: Permanently delete a diary entry. This cannot be undone.
tools.diary_list_tooltip: List diary dates in a range with short previews.
tools.diary_search_tooltip: Keyword search across your personal diaries (not the public internet).
tools.summary_read_tooltip: Read AI-generated weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly summaries.
tools.message_search_tooltip: Search past chat messages across sessions by keyword.
tools.memory_store_tooltip: Save important facts to long-term memory for later semantic recall.
tools.memory_delete_tooltip: Remove stored memories. Confirm with the user before deleting.
tools.param_search_engine_desc: Select the engine used for web search
tools.param_max_length_desc: Maximum characters returned when reading a web page
tools.param_rag_enabled_desc: When enabled, search results are filtered by relevance via vector retrieval (requires an embedding model)
tools.param_rag_max_chunks_desc: Maximum number of extracted chunks to provide to the AI as reference, determining the upper limit of token consumption
tools.param_rag_chunks_per_source_desc: Maximum number of chunks extracted from a single website, preventing a long article from dominating the results
tools.param_plain_snippet_length_desc: When an Embedding model is not configured, the system falls back to concatenating the raw text. To avoid consuming too many Tokens, text will be truncated per site after this length
tools.param_tavily_api_key_desc: Tavily search API key (get free at https://app.tavily.com)
tools.param_exa_api_key_desc: Exa search API key (get at https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys)

shortcuts.translate_content: Please translate the following text into English faithfully and elegantly (including explanations of professional terms):
shortcuts.summarize_content: Please summarize the core meaning behind the following content:

tools.web_search_desc:
Search the internet for current information, news, and real-time data. You may use this when the user asks about recent events, current facts, or anything that requires up-to-date information beyond your training data.

IMPORTANT: This tool searches the PUBLIC INTERNET only. Do NOT use this to search the user's personal diary entries — use diary_search for that.

You may provide 2-3 search queries with different angles/keywords to get comprehensive results. For example, if the user asks about "iPhone 16 vs Samsung S25", you could search ["iPhone 16 specs review", "Samsung S25 specs review", "iPhone 16 vs Samsung S25 comparison"].

Results include clickable [title](url) citations — use the url_read tool to read specific pages in detail.
tools.vector_search_desc: Semantic search over conversation history and stored memories. You may use this when recalling past content not already covered in the current context (including any rolling compression summary). Returns semantically relevant snippets with scores.
tools.url_read_desc: Read the text content of a specific webpage URL directly. Use this when you have a specific link you want to analyze or summarize, instead of searching the whole web.
tools.summary_read_desc: Read AI-generated summaries (weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly). Returns the summary content for a specific time period. Use diary_list or diary_search for raw diary entries instead.
tools.message_search_desc: Search past conversation messages across all sessions by keyword. Returns matching message snippets with session title and date. Useful when the user references something discussed before, or when you need to recall previous conversations.
tools.memory_store_desc: Store important information as long-term memory for later semantic search retrieval. Use this tool when the user expresses preferences, makes decisions, or when you encounter information worth remembering. Stored memories are vectorized and can be retrieved via the vector_search tool.
tools.memory_delete_desc: Delete stored memories by semantic search. First searches for memories matching the query, then deletes the matching entries. Use this when the user wants to forget something or remove outdated information. IMPORTANT: Always confirm with the user before deleting memories.
tools.diary_write_desc: Create a new diary entry for a given date. If a diary entry already exists for that date, use diary_edit instead.
tools.diary_search_desc:
Search the user's PERSONAL DIARY/JOURNAL entries by keyword. Returns matching diary dates and content snippets. Use this when the user asks about their own past experiences, memories, or personal records.

IMPORTANT: This tool ONLY searches the user's personal diary entries stored locally, NOT the internet. To search the internet, use the web_search tool instead.
tools.diary_read_desc: Read the full content of one or more diary entries by their exact dates. Supports reading up to 20 entries at once. Use diary_list or diary_search first if you do not know the exact date.
tools.diary_list_desc: List all diary entries within a date range (inclusive). Returns a list of dates that have diary entries, along with a brief preview of each entry. Use this to discover which days the user has written diaries.
tools.diary_edit_desc: Modify an existing diary entry. Default mode is "append", which adds new content with a timestamp header (##### HH:mm:ss). Use "overwrite" mode to replace the entire content. Tags are automatically merged with existing ones.
tools.diary_delete_desc: Delete a specific diary entry. This is a destructive action and cannot be undone. Always double check before using.
tools.current_time_desc: Get the current real-world time, date, and day of the week. Very useful for answering questions related to time calculations, age, absolute dates, etc.
tools.compress_context_upstream_desc: Merge earlier dialogue into a rolling summary before the next model request (upstream).
tools.compress_context_downstream_desc: Refresh the summary and prune long tool outputs after the assistant reply is saved (downstream).

chat.empty_hint: Try asking: 'What diaries did I write this week?'
chat.err_format: Invalid request format, please check message content and retry
chat.err_unauthorized: Invalid API Key or no access to this model
chat.err_too_many_requests: Too many requests, please try again later
chat.err_server: Server temporarily unavailable, please try again later
chat.err_timeout: Request timeout, please check network and retry
chat.err_network: Could not connect to server, please check network settings
chat.err_no_model: Please configure an AI model in Settings first
chat.cost_disclaimer: Costs are for reference only, subject to official rates.
chat.compression_help_intro: When context tokens exceed your companion's threshold, earlier turns are merged into a "conversation compression" summary, then sent to the model together with recent full turns.
chat.compression_help_trigger_body: Enable Auto Compress on the companion and set a token threshold (0 disables). Checked before each send and after each reply; above threshold the model updates the summary and long tool outputs may be pruned.
chat.compression_help_chain_3: Round 1, 2…: only post-compression turns, renumbered from 1
chat.compression_help_footer_tokens: Context tokens: rough estimate of system prompt + compression summary + messages in the current window
chat.compression_help_footer_rounds: Context rounds: user turns after compression / companion round limit (unlimited = no round cap)
chat.compression_help_keep_body: The last N user turns stay verbatim (assistant replies and tool calls in each turn). Older content goes into the summary. Configure N on the companion.
chat.compression_help_branch_body: Branching copies messages and a valid compression snapshot. Resend/edit on an earlier message drops the snapshot anchor if that message was removed, restoring full text instead of the summary.
chat.compaction_between_rounds: Earlier turns are compressed; numbering below restarts at round 1
chat.compressing_context_hint: Earlier messages are being merged into a summary. You can continue once it finishes.
chat.compression_thinking_waiting: Waiting for compression model to think…
chat.recompress_hint: Regenerate the summary using the same message span as the last compression
chat.recompress_banner_hint: Regenerating summary — you can switch items or pages; it will update when done
chat.recompress_range_hint: Choose which conversation rounds (full turns before the compression cutoff) to send to the model for a new summary.
chat.no_context_messages: No context sent to the model yet
chat.select_chain_item: Select an item on the left to view full content
chat.pricing_source_tooltip: Click to view raw API pricing data in external browser
chat.pricing_refresh_network_error: Network error, please check your connection
chat.pricing_boot_load_failed: Could not fetch the models.dev pricing table. Cost estimates may be inaccurate — check your network and refresh in the billing panel.
chat.delete_confirm_multi: Delete $count conversations? This cannot be undone.
chat.delete_msg_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message history? This action is irreversible.
chat.tts_not_configured: TTS model not configured, please configure a TTS model in settings

sessions.companion_desc: Start chatting directly without managing sessions
sessions.companion_on: Enabled — Single continuous chat, no session concept
sessions.memory_window_desc: Send recent {count} messages to the model
sessions.persona_hint: Describe the Partner's identity and style
sessions.behavior_hint: Describe rules the Partner must follow

rag.title: RAG Memory Manager
rag.clear_all_content: Are you sure you want to delete all embedded vector data? This action cannot be undone.
rag.rag_disabled_hint: Global memory is disabled, Partner will not use RAG retrieval
rag.detect_failed: Detection failed, please check model config
rag.clear_dim_content:
Delete all ${dimension}-D vector data?
Other dimensions will not be affected.
rag.batch_embed_content:
This will read all diary entries and generate vector embeddings.
Existing entries will not be re-embedded.
This may take some time.
rag.memories_auto_hint: Memories will be stored here automatically after chatting with Agent
rag.migration_pending_content:
The previous embedding migration was not completed (possibly due to app crash).

Continue migration? Backup data is still safe.
rag.migration_mismatch_content:
The memory in the current workspace uses a different embedding model.
This will cause old memories to be completely hidden from AI searches due to vector dimension mismatch.

Do you want to migrate and unify them to the latest global model? (If you click [Later], you can still do this manually in the RAG page anytime.)
rag.migration_model_changed_content:
Embedding model change detected.

Old vector data is incompatible with the new model dimensions, all data needs to be re-embedded.

This will:
• Backup existing text metadata
• Clear old vectors and re-embed with new model
• Auto-verify data integrity after completion

Process runs asynchronously in the background.
rag.migration_switch_warning_content: The new model may be incompatible with existing vectors. Diary embeddings will be rebuilt in the background. Continue?

assistant.prompt_hint: Define the companion's role, behavior and response style...
assistant.context_window_desc: How many recent conversation turns are sent to the model. One turn starts with your message and includes the assistant reply and any tool calls in that turn. More turns mean longer memory but higher token usage.
assistant.set_default_desc: Automatically use this companion for new conversations
assistant.empty_hint: Your matrix is empty. No mind cores deployed yet.
assistant.delete_confirm_content: Are you sure you want to permanently obliterate this agent's data? It cannot be undone.
assistant.context_unlimited_desc: No turn limit—all conversation history (each turn includes your message, the reply, and tool calls) is sent to the model.
assistant.bind_model_desc: Once bound, new conversations with this partner will prioritize the selected model
assistant.compress_disabled_desc: Conversations will not be auto-compressed, all messages are retained
assistant.compress_enabled_desc: Old messages are compressed to summaries when threshold is exceeded
assistant.compress_tooltip: When conversation context exceeds the set Token threshold, the system will automatically compress early conversation content, keeping recent conversation rounds.
assistant.compress_keep_turns_desc: When compression triggers, the most recent turns are kept in full. One turn starts with your message and includes the assistant reply and any tool calls in that turn; older turns are summarized.
assistant.compress_keep_turns_tooltip: When compression triggers, the specified number of recent turns are kept as full text (your message, the reply, and tool calls in each turn) so context stays coherent.
assistant.compress_system_prompt_desc: System instruction sent to the model when generating the conversation compression summary. Use Reset to load the built-in default for your UI language.
assistant.default_assistant_desc: An ancient vampire noble and BaiShou's eternal memory guardian.
assistant.keep_one_error: Must keep at least one companion
assistant.delete_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete all configurations for this assistant. This action cannot be reversed.
assistant.title: Partner Management
assistant.picker_no_selection: Select a companion to view details
assistant.kind_companion_description: Can edit diaries and search RAG memories—ideal for daily companionship and life journaling.
assistant.kind_work_description: For knowledge lookup and work tasks only—no diary or memory access.

workspace.recent_hint: Only the three most recently used workspaces are shown
workspace.help_intro: Each workspace is a separate local data area. Switching refreshes the page and loads that workspace's content.
workspace.help_global_title: Stays the same when you switch
workspace.help_global_ai: AI providers, models, and RAG settings

home.desc: 仪表盘暂未施工完成，可切换前往日记页查看以往记录。

storage.title: Storage
storage.restart_hint: Workspace data and settings have been restored. Restart the app is recommended.
storage.create_snapshot_desc: Save a local snapshot of current data
storage.all_files_access_desc: On Android 11+, access to BaiShou_Root requires enabling “Allow management of all files” in system settings.
storage.all_files_access_desc_optional: Diaries are saved in the app’s private folder—you can write without this permission. To share BaiShou_Root with the desktop app, enable “All files access” in system settings.
storage.all_files_access_settings_hint: Enable “Allow management of all files” for BaiShou in system settings, then return to the app.
storage.settings_open_failed: Could not open system permission settings. Go to Settings → Apps → App management → BaiShou → Permissions → All files access, enable it, then return to the app.
storage.use_external_root_confirm: Set the data root to external BaiShou_Root (/storage/emulated/0/BaiShou_Root). Use the same path if sharing data with desktop or other devices.
storage.external_access_error: Cannot access external BaiShou_Root. Enable “All files access” in system settings.
storage.permission_request_message: BaiShou needs storage access to save diaries and backups in BaiShou_Root.
storage.permission_confirm_message: BaiShou needs access to BaiShou_Root on your device storage. You will be taken to system settings—enable “Allow management of all files”, then return to the app.
storage.permission_confirm_message_xiaomi: You will be taken to MIUI settings. Under Permissions → Files & documents (or “All files access”), allow BaiShou, then return to the app.
storage.permission_confirm_message_huawei: You will be taken to EMUI / HarmonyOS settings. Under Permissions → Storage or Files, allow BaiShou, then return to the app.
storage.permission_confirm_message_oppo: You will be taken to realme / ColorOS permissions. Turning on Storage alone is not enough—tap Set individual permissions, then enable Allow management of all files, and return to the app.
storage.only_standard_storage_granted: Storage is on, but BaiShou also needs Allow management of all files to write BaiShou_Root.
storage.only_standard_storage_granted_oppo: Storage is enabled, but that is not enough. On this page tap Set individual permissions, enable Allow management of all files, then return to BaiShou.
storage.permission_confirm_message_vivo: You will be taken to OriginOS settings. Under Permissions → Storage or All files, allow BaiShou, then return to the app.
storage.permission_confirm_message_samsung: You will be taken to Samsung settings. Under Permissions → Files and media or All files access, allow BaiShou, then return to the app.
storage.change_directory_confirm: The data root will point to the selected folder and reload. No data will be copied or deleted. Continue?
storage.change_directory_empty_warning: The selected folder is empty. If it does not already contain BaiShou data, your diaries may not appear after switching.
storage.migrate_confirm: All data under the current root will be copied to the selected folder. The original directory will not be deleted. Continue?
storage.migrate_target_not_empty: The target folder already has files. Continuing may overwrite items with the same names.
storage.migrate_same_path: Target folder is the same as the current data root
storage.migrate_inside_source: Cannot choose a subfolder inside the current data root
storage.migrate_switch_prompt: Data has been copied to the new folder; the original directory is unchanged. Switch to the new root and reload?
storage.migrate_switched: Switched to the new directory and reloaded
storage.migrate_switch_failed: Directory updated, but reload failed. Please restart the app
storage.migrate_kept_source: Original directory kept; root not switched
storage.flutter_legacy_migration_no_delete_notic: Migration copies files only. Your original data is not deleted or moved.
storage.flutter_legacy_migration_complete: Legacy data copied to the new directory
storage.flutter_legacy_migration_permission_requ: Storage permission is required. Grant “All files access” and try again.
storage.flutter_legacy_migrating: Copying data from the legacy directory…
storage.flutter_legacy_migrating_hint: Do not close the app. The original directory is not deleted.
storage.flutter_legacy_delete_failed: Could not delete the legacy directory. Confirm migration finished and try again.
storage.migrating_data_hint: Do not close the app. The original directory will not be deleted
storage.directory_not_writable: Cannot write to the selected folder. Check permissions or choose another path.
storage.mounting_data_safe_hint: Connecting to BaiShou_Root. Local diaries remain in their original folder and will not be cleared.
storage.mounting_slow_title: Preparing diary storage in the background
storage.mounting_slow_desc: Your data is not lost. BaiShou is connecting to /storage/emulated/0/BaiShou_Root and restoring indexes; larger datasets may take a little while.
storage.indexing_desc: Your data is not lost. BaiShou has connected to local storage and is scanning diaries, sessions, and summaries. Larger datasets may take about a minute.

version_migration.title: Version Migration
version_migration.description: Detect legacy BaiShou data, view size per section, and import selectively. Legacy directories are never deleted.
version_migration.no_legacy_data: No migratable legacy data found. If you just upgraded, ensure the legacy directory is still accessible.
version_migration.import_confirm_message: Data will be copied and merged from the legacy directory without deleting it. Continue with this section?
version_migration.warning_personas_partial: Only the active identity card was detected (ZIP backups may omit other cards)
version_migration.warning_chats_no_assistants: No companions found; import companions before chat history
version_migration.import_section_unavailable: No legacy data for this section
version_migration.import_chat_missing_assistant: Some sessions were skipped due to missing companion mapping; import companions first
version_migration.warning_agent_db_read_failed: Could not read legacy assistant/chat database (copied into app sandbox for SQLite; if it still fails, check storage permission and agent.sqlite).
version_migration.warning_agent_db_read_partial: Some legacy databases could not be read; results may be incomplete.
version_migration.permission_required: Storage permission is required to read legacy data. Grant "All files access" and retry.
version_migration.db_not_ready: Database is not ready yet. Please rescan in a moment.
version_migration.import_nothing_new: Nothing new was imported (data may already exist).
version_migration.reimport_confirm_message: This section was already imported. Importing again may duplicate data. Continue?
version_migration.warning_import_workspaces_first: Import Workspaces first, then diaries and chats, to avoid writing data into the wrong vault.
version_migration.import_order_hint: Recommended: Global (avatar/identity/settings) → each workspace (diaries + companions & chats)
version_migration.import_all_workspaces_confirm: Import diaries, companions, and chats for every workspace in order. Continue?
version_migration.invalid_legacy_directory: The selected folder is not a valid legacy BaiShou root. Choose a BaiShou_Root folder that contains vaults.
version_migration.legacy_source_manual: Using a manually selected legacy directory
version_migration.legacy_source_flutter: Auto-detected original Flutter BaiShou data directory
version_migration.legacy_source_migrated: Using legacy directory from full migration record
version_migration.restart_message: Workspace data has been imported. To ensure diaries, summaries, and companions refresh correctly when switching workspaces, please fully quit BaiShou and open it again.

emoji.no_native_support: Your browser does not support color emoji
emoji.keyboard_hint: When there are search results, use keyboard to select.
emoji.upload_avatar_hint: Upload an image from your device as avatar

version_control.title: Version Control
version_control.git_status_tooltip: Git manages version history for all vaults under the storage root: track changes, push to remote repositories (GitHub/Gitee), and collaborate across devices. Use it to rollback mistaken restores from file sync or full backup. Desktop only.
version_control.git_scope_desc: The Git repository lives at the storage root and tracks changes across all vaults (journals, sessions, attachments, etc.). Each vault's `.baishou/` directory is excluded and managed by File Sync instead.
version_control.remote_config_help:
The Git remote backs up content files under your storage root across all vaults (journals, attachments, etc.). It is separate from per-vault .baishou/ incremental sync.

Configure in this page:
1. Create an empty private repo on GitHub / Gitee
2. Remote URL: HTTPS clone URL, e.g. https://github.com/user/repo.git
3. Branch: match the remote default (often main or master)
4. For HTTPS: platform username + Personal Access Token (not your login password)
5. Click Save in this section, then Test connection

Or configure in a terminal at the storage root:
git remote add origin <repo-url>
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main
After that, you can enter the same URL here to push/pull from the app.
version_control.commit_placeholder: Enter commit message (timestamp used if empty)

settings.title: TTS Voice Synthesis Settings
settings.mimo_base_url_placeholder: Leave empty for default service, or enter a custom service URL
settings.api_key_optional_hint: Leave empty if your gateway does not require authentication. When a key is set, fetch models and test playback will send it.
settings.api_key_tooltip: Leave empty if your gateway does not require authentication. When a key is set, fetch models and test playback will send it.
settings.page_tooltip: Configure the global TTS provider, model, and voice. For OpenAI-compatible gateways you can use Base URL only—leave API Key empty to fetch models and preview when no auth is required.
settings.voice_hint: Enter the voice / speaker ID supported by the current model
settings.mimo_ref_audio_hint: MiMo voice clone reads this sample to replicate the voice; no Voice ID needed
settings.mimo_ref_audio_mobile_hint: Tap the button to choose a wav/mp3 file; it will be saved to external storage
settings.mimo_ref_audio_required: MiMo voice clone requires a reference audio path
settings.mimo_ref_audio_unsupported_format: MiMo voice clone only supports wav/mp3 reference audio; convert m4a and other formats first
settings.mimo_voice_design_placeholder: Required, e.g. warm young female voice, moderate pace, slightly magnetic
settings.mimo_voice_design_hint: The more specific the description, the closer the generated voice
settings.mimo_voice_design_required: MiMo voice design requires a voice description
settings.mimo_style_prompt_placeholder: e.g. light and natural tone, slightly faster pace
settings.mimo_style_prompt_hint: Control tone, emotion, and rhythm in natural language; leave empty for default style
settings.prompt_text_placeholder: Required: spoken text in the reference audio
settings.test_default: Hello, how are you doing today?
